cases.prompt: 배포 전에 전체 보안 감사 해줘

assertions.text: The agent runs all 5 stages: security-checklist, authz-designer, paid-api-guard, /cso comprehensive, /codex challenge.
The agent produces a consolidated SUMMARY with issues sorted by severity (Critical/High/Medium/Low).
The agent recognizes this is a narrow scope and delegates to security-checklist, not running the full 5-stage pipeline.
